rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §84.002 governs contents of early voting ballot applications. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 84.002. CONTENTS OF APPLICATION. (a) An early voting ballot application must include:
_note: No conflict; proposed change to property tax exemption has no bearing on early voting ballot application requirements.
